nodes.title: 🅛🅣🅧 Gemma API Text Encode - NEGATIVE
widgets_values: pc game, console game, video game, cartoon, childish, ugly

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: pc game, console game, video game, ugly, 3d render, photo, still, static, slow

nodes.title: Base prompt
widgets_values: 360 degree equirectangular panorama, high quality, detailed

When Estimate Camera node is connected, it drives the focal px / hfov deg. You can use fov_scale to override the fov by a factor you input there, in case you feel like the original video is too small a portion of the outpainted video. This will, however, cause distortion.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: 360 degree equirectangular panorama, high quality, detailed video

groups.title: Set prompts     -> use API nodes to save on memory
